style_summary: Crisp, true-to-life images with balanced exposure, natural color saturation, and a clear, neutral tone that emphasizes architectural and environmental details.

facets.exposure: balanced exposure with bright but controlled luminance
facets.contrast: clean moderate contrast that keeps edges crisp without feeling harsh
facets.white_balance: neutral white balance with accurate whites
facets.saturation: natural, believable saturation with restrained color boosts
facets.highlight_handling: preserve bright highlights while keeping window detail readable
facets.shadow_handling: keep shadows open enough to retain structural detail
facets.scene_tendency: works cleanly across interiors and exteriors with real-estate clarity

composed_prompt: Crisp, true-to-life images with balanced exposure, natural color saturation, and a clear, neutral tone that emphasizes architectural and environmental details. Exposure: balanced exposure with bright but controlled luminance. Contrast: clean moderate contrast that keeps edges crisp without feeling harsh. White balance: neutral white balance with accurate whites. Saturation: natural, believable saturation with restrained color boosts. Highlight handling: preserve bright highlights while keeping window detail readable. Shadow handling: keep shadows open enough to retain structural detail. Scene tendency: works cleanly across interiors and exteriors with real-estate clarity. Mood: clear, polished, documentary-real.
